input-field.name: frontendTokenCookieName
input-field.label: SW Context Token Cookie Name
input-field.helpText: Name of the cookie the mobile app injects into the WebView containing the sw-context-token. Required for all storefront requests.

input-field.name: defaultAddressId
input-field.label: Default Customer Address ID
input-field.helpText: UUID of the default customer_address entity assigned as default billing and shipping address for new customers.

input-field.name: autoLogInEnabled
input-field.label: Trigger session cookie on Save
input-field.helpText: Toggle ON and save to generate a session cookie for the selected customer. Resets to OFF automatically. Use for browser-based WebView testing.
